title: Add research run report (Golden Test 19)
problem: ticket-020 completes domain proposal gating, but deterministic research run reporting is not yet implemented. Golden Test 19 requires every research run to produce a machine-readable run report with failure modes.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 19: every research run produces a run report.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic run report generation after fixture-mode research spine without Ollama.
Report JSON includes required counters and machine-readable top_failure_modes.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
